name: Exa Search Plugin
description: Direct integration with Exa AI search via HTTP/SSE - No API key required. Includes web_search and code_search tools.
author: wysh3

searchProvider.description: Search provider for web_search tool. Defaults to 'exa'.

tavilyApiKey.description: Tavily API key. Can also be set via TAVILY_API_KEY environment variable.

enabled.label: Enable Exa Search
enabled.description: Enable web search and code search tools via Exa AI

searchProvider.label: Search Provider
searchProvider.description: Choose between Exa (default) or Tavily for web search

tavilyApiKey.label: Tavily API Key
tavilyApiKey.description: API key for Tavily search (required when using Tavily provider)
